sql_array: CREATE TABLE SampleGraph (id INT PRIMARY KEY, graph_url VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_RDF_REPL_GRAPH_INS((SELECT graph_url FROM SampleGraph WHERE id = NEW SampleGraph(1, NULL).id)) FROM DUAL;
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_RDF_REPL_GRAPH_INS(NEW SampleGraph(3, NULL)) WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SampleGraph) > 0;
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_RDF_REPL_GRAPH_INS(NEW SampleGraph((SELECT MIN(id) FROM SampleGraph), 'http://fuzzing.test.org/2')) FROM DUAL;
SELECT id, graph_url FROM SampleGraph WHERE graph_url IS NULL OR graph_url = '';
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM SampleGraph WHERE id IN (SELECT NEW SampleGraph(1, NULL).id FROM SampleGraph) HAVING COUNT(id) > 1;
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_RDF_REPL_GRAPH_INS(NEW SampleGraph(id, graph_url) WHERE id < (SELECT AVG(id) FROM SampleGraph));
SELECT NEW SampleGraph(1, 'http://edge.case.test.org/') AS edge_case_instance WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM SampleGraph WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE EdgeTest (edge_id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, edge_graph VARCHAR(255) NULL);
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_RDF_REPL_GRAPH_INS(COALESCE((SELECT edge_graph FROM EdgeTest WHERE edge_id = 1), 'http://default.test.org/')) AS rep_graph;
SELECT NEW SampleGraph(3, NEW SampleGraph(4, 'http://nested.test.org')::VARCHAR) AS nested_instance;
